chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-319 of 2020 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For order as to maintainability of petition 24.08.2021 Mr. Shariq Mubashir, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, Addl. A. G. ------ Counsel for the petitioner states that he would be satisfied and would not press the instant petition, if directions are issued to the respondents to act in accordance with law. Order accordingly. The instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed, along with the pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE SM
